name: Equitas Small Finance Bank Limited
summary: Equitas Small Finance Bank Limited provides banking and financial services in India. It operates through Treasury, Corporate/Wholesale Banking, Retail Banking, and Other Banking Operations segments. The company offers current, savings, and salary accounts; and term, bulk, and certificates of deposits. It also provides small business loans comprising secured business, self employed and salaried, agri, and housing loans; group loans to microentrepreneurial women; vehicle finance for used and new commercial vehicles, and used passenger cars; micro and small enterprise finance, such as working capital loans, and fund based and non-fund based products; and loans to financial institutions and corporates. In addition, the company offers insurance, FASTag, and asset management services; ATM and debit cards/point of sale services; call centre services; and mobile, phone, and internet banking services. It has 854 banking outlets and 322 ATMs. The company was formerly known as Equitas Finance Limited and changed its name to Equitas Small Finance Bank Limited in September 2016. Equitas Small Finance Bank Limited was incorporated in 1993 and is headquartered in Chennai, India. Equitas Small Finance Bank Limited operates as a subsidiary of Equitas Holdings Limited.
